entry.title: Re: Open a page from an app in SAP Build work zone standa...
entry.content:
Hello, 

for me it looks like you might have mixed up some IDs here. Please see the following URL and the explanations for the parameters afterwards. Consider especially the difference between site ID and page ID.

https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site/<insert your site alias here>#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=<insert your page ID>&spaceID=<insert your space ID> 

Site Alias: This is the alias that you can configure for your Build Work Zone Std. Ed. Site (three dot menu in the Site Directory for your site -> Manage Site Alias. It seems that you configured this to be "Portal" is that correct? If yes than this part of the URL is correct and the launchpad should open with the link at the end of this message. If you have not configured a site alias, then the site ID needs to be specified with the parameter siteID (see in Site Manager in the details of the site). Then the link should look something like this:

https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site?siteID=<insert your site ID here>#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=<insert your page ID>&spaceID=<insert your space ID> 

Page ID: This is the ID of the BWZ Page (not site) in the sense of spaces and pages, the "new" layout options of the SAP Fiori launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition launchpad. This you can see in the BWZ Content Manager when opening the details of a page.

Space ID: This is the ID of the BWZ Space) in the sense of spaces and pages, the "new" layout options of the SAP Fiori launchpad and SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition launchpad. This you can see in the BWZ Content Manager when opening the details of a space. Specify the space which contains the above mentioned page.

Note: Both, page ID and space ID need to be specified.

 

To just link the "Portal" BWZ launchpad you can omit the page ID and the space ID and the first space/page of the launchpad will be displayed. The link should then look something like this:

with site alias: https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site/Portal 

or with site ID: https://wasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/site?siteID=<insert your site ID here> 

 

Let me know if it works.

Best regards
Simon

entry.title: Re: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent projection view.
entry.content: @Gargi6Can you share the definitions of the base entities (parent and child) as well as the projection entities?

entry.title: Re: Deploying App into SAP Build Work Zone / Fiori Launchpad in BTP

Would it be necessary to create two separate sites, each connecting to a different backend, or is there an alternative method you would recommend?

entry.title: Re: Program for KSB1 to run multiple variants together
entry.content: Look at class cl_salv_ex_util, cl_salv_bs_tt_util to convert returned data to xlsx, html, pdf, etc.

entry.title: Re: Choosing the Right Analytical Tool: A Comprehensive Guide for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
@Katharina_Klug : Very nice articulated. In recent discussions with clients, we have often seen clients being confused whether they'll suffice with embedded analytics or would they require enterprise wide analytical layer. Though it seems straight forward for the decision, but in real life it often is not - and this blogpost is a good starting point to get on with the decision matrix. Looking forward for more.

Thanks,
Saumi

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google...
entry.content:
The issue was caused by the setup of the service account, which prevented direct OS login. Once this is enabled the SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, Fully-Activated Appliance deployment completes successfully. 

Thank you for the cooperation on this, Budi.

entry.title: Re: Delta sync is not working for custom entity created in SSAM 2405 mobile OData.
entry.content: Yes Delta sync is enabled at OMDO level, but that does not solve the issue. I think it would need custom exchange objects to be created to solve this problem.

entry.title: Deletion Chart of Account Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have retroactively created a chart of accounts that we intend to use as our group chart of accounts. During the saving process, SAP prompts for the first account number of the chart (see example screenshots).

The problem arises when the length of the G/L account number is not specified in the background field “Length of G/L Account Number.” Despite this omission, SAP still saves the configuration in a transport request, which we consider a significant source of error. If the length is not defined, the account will never be transferred to the new chart of accounts, leading to a dead end.

In our case, we accidentally omitted the length, resulting in no usable account in the newly created chart of accounts. This prevents us from copying additional accounts, as the system only allows copying — not creating new accounts, even in the “Manage G/L Account Master Data” app.

We are now looking for possible solutions to resolve this issue:

  1. Is there a way to retroactively create an initial account for the new group chart of accounts, which could then be used as a template for copying others?
  2. Can the Group chart of account be deleted?
  3. Is it possible to delete the created transport request? (We are aware of the “Undo Change” functionality but are unsure of its exact impact.)
  4. Would opening a support ticket with SAP be helpful?
  5. Or is the only viable option to ignore the current setup and create a new chart of accounts from scratch?

Any insights or suggestions from the community would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Single Delivery from Multiple Sales Order
entry.content: Any idea how to do the same in ECC

entry.title: Re: Webclient UI API UDOFrom Grid setValue and getValue f...

entry.title: Bapi for F-36 bill of exchange many invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any bapi to post documents like in F-36? I need to post a bill of exchange using many sd invoice as Assignment. I tried with BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST and POSTING_INTERFACE_DOCUMENT but it doesn't work.

Thanks!

María

entry.title: Re: Issue with file uploader in sap Fiori custom apps after upgrade
entry.content: I have also tried var file = oEvent.getParameter("files")[0]; but no luck.

entry.title: Re: Manage Supply Shortage and Excess Supply with MRP Material Coverage Apps
entry.content:
Hi Markus,

Thanks for this great overview. This really supports the business challenges with regards to monitoring exceptions. Also the related MRP Change Request functionality is of a great advantage. There is one issue which I encounter in multiple businesses:

In case the Supplier confirmation (Confirmation Category: AB) is MRP relevant, the MRP element changes to a Shipping Notification. An MRP element "Shipping Notification" is not relevant for MRP Change Requests. There will be a schedule-in or schedule-out message in Manage Material Coverage, but no action can be carried out. Also, no dates are proposed for schedule-in or schedule-out.

According to most business requirements, the AB confirmation must be MRP relevant AND the order line still needs to pop-up in the MRP Change Request app until the inbound delivery is created. 

Will this functionality be added soon in S/4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION?

Best regards,

Henk

entry.title: Re: How to change Storage Location in S/4HANA Service Order?
entry.content:
Hey Silvia,
thanks for your answer! We will implement a solution via BAdI and hope for some standard fields like Plant and Storage Location in future! Otherwise the user doen't know which combination was determined.

Best regards
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Story report - access and filtering
entry.content:
The managers (Line Manager LM) needing to see just their team data should be assigned one role based permission, those needing to see their team and complete company data (Group Manager - GM) are assigned two role based permissions (LM &GM). Create two copies of the report.  Share one report to just the LM  role and then share the other report with the  (GM role) . The manager will need to log into the relevant report to see just their team data, or the other report for the complete data set. The Role permissions will take care of what they see.

You need two reports, as the managers with both sets of permissions will always see complete data, as this is the least restrictive permission. 

If the GM managers are savvy users, you could create one report, assigned to both roles, as they could search for their team data.

entry.title: Set Default Filter Value for Work Center Category in Create Maintenance Request (F1511A) App
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using the standard SAP Fiori App "Create Maintenance Request" (F1511A). When user clicks on the value help for the Main Work Center, a dialog opens where they can search using filters such as Work Center, Plant and Work Center Category. 

As part of business requirements, they would like the Work Center Category filter to default to 0005 (Plant Maintenance) each time the value help dialog is opened.

We explored UI adaptation options using SAP Business Application Studio. Checked for controller extensions. 

Is there any supported way to default the Work Center Category filter field to 0005 in the value help dialog for Main Work Center. If yes, kindly advise how we can achieve this.

Richitha

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google...
entry.content:
Hello Budi,

The problem was caused by a limitation in the used by you service account, which disabled direct OS login. Once this is enabled, the S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, Fully Activated Appliance deploys successfully.

Thank you for the cooperation on this, and best regards,

Tsvetinka

Also, the invoice and accounting document has been completed for this order.

Can someone please tell is there any way to approve this sales order because user is not agreeing to make a new order instead?

entry.title: Getting error in SAP Integration Suite IFLOW - Unresolved variable : request.formparam.code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a new https to http iflow in SAP integration suite. It is calling POST API in teh receiver side. I have separately tested the receiver API in POSTMAN and works. It has input json and returns json payload. 

When call the end point url in POSTMAN i see the below error in the step for calling the receiver http service.

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Status code:400; Reason: { "errorMessage": "Unresolved variable : request.formparam.code", "errorReason":"Missing a Parameter", "errorStatus":400 }

Why is this error? what am i missing?

My Sender HTTPS config;

 

My receive HTTP config is as below:

My content modifer config:

Integration flow config:

Thanks

Gopal

entry.title: Re: Journal entry - Add standard fields in Substitution rules

entry.title: Re: How to set up an ATC check run for enhancements in an...
entry.content:
Based on the investigation done by SAP-Support, the most likely reason for the issue is, that I was re-using a check run defined while the system was not yet (fully) converted to S/4HANA 7.58. What they saw during debugging was that the series was missing a certain flag that leads to the inclusion of enhancements, but that flag cannot be set anywhere on the UI in release SAP_BASIS 7.58.

When I created a new check run for several objects from scratch and executed that, enhancements were automatically included in the checks and results.

entry.title: Re: How to use COOIS / COHV as a production cockpit
entry.content:
as already assumed it was maybe just too simple.

Can be saved directly into the selection variant via the second tab:

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
Hi @jeremiah_duroya ,

With 2505 it is available with SAP BTP ABAP Environment and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. With 2508 it will be available with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as well. 

The Private cloud is released around Aug/Sept timelines.  Hope that answers your question.

entry.title: Delete SAML Console Login configuration
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

By mistake I connected the wrong tenant Console SAML Login with the wrong SAML app. How can I delete this Console SAML Login configuration?

It's urgent.

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Delete SAML Console Login configuration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

You can changed SAML Login settings anytime in the Console under Administration tab.

You can also refer Product documentation about Console SAML Login.

0002702544 - How to set up login into the CDC Admin Console through an external SAML Identity Provider (IdP)

 

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
entry.content:

We have HANA 2.0 running on 2 node cluster (Pacemaker).. 

The HANA database on node 2 is down and when i try to start it, it gives me below error 

FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running

I tried many solutions like removing the locks files, changing the permission etc.. but it didnt resovle

Please suggest

Thanks

bilal

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
@mpredolim ,

So sorry for the very late response to your query, I completely missed it :(.  

Can you please confirm that the destination you are configuring in ADT is present in your BAS instance?  The error message returned is because when Fiori tools launches in Business Application Studio, it cannot find the destination configured.  Please ensure that you have that destination setup in your BTP cockpit.

entry.title: How to Create Dynamic virtual table in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me How to create Dynamic Virtual table in SAP Business Application Studio(BAS),

We are doing a replication project where we are moving data from source to HanaCloud, With the help of DP Agent & Adapters we created remote source & created virtual tables in BAS and we are moving data from virtual table to Hana Table.

Hence we are giving Hardcoded values while creating virtual table, But In Source the Table Name & Schema Name are different in Dev, Qa & Prod. Once I Created virtual table in dev the same has to move to QA through MTAR, We are not suppose to change anything in QA Manually and same to prod.

So, In this case How can I achieve creating virtual tables with different names in Dev, Qa and Prod?

I tried creating .hdbvirtualtableconfig and Environmental variables but couldn't achieve the solution, Please help me where I am missing Or If any other approach, Explain In-detail.

Please refer to the above screenshots I have created Environmental variables & Test1.hdbvirtualtableconfig, When I deploy Test1.hdbvirtualtableconfig,  virtual table is not created.

Thanks In Advance

entry.title: 在SAP BTP上创建定时运行的作业：Integration Suite（集成套件）中的实用指南
entry.content:
在企业数字化转型的过程中，自动化和定时任务的实施变得尤为关键。SAP Business Technology Platform（BTP）提供了强大的Integration Suite，使得开发者可以轻松地创建和管理集成流程，实现定时调度、数据传输等自动化目标。本文将详细介绍如何在BTP上配置一个定时运行作业，可集成例如 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition这样的SaaS服务，更灵活地实现自定义逻辑流的定时触发与执行，并监控执行结果。

本文主要创意来源和技术支持由 Cloud ERP PSCC  @Fancy_Zou 提供。

一、进入Integration Suite界面

首先，登录到SAP BTP cockpit，导航至Integration Suite界面（如下图1）：

在左侧菜单中，点击“Design（设计）”，进入“集成和API”界面（图2），该处集中管理所有的集成包和组件。

图1 - Integration Suite 主页

 

二、选择合适的包和查看组件

在“集成和API”界面中，你可以看到你已有的所有Package（包）。选择一个需要操作的包，进入该包内可以查看和管理其包含的所有集成部件。

 

图2 - 集成和API界面

 

三、创建集成流程（Integration Flow）

在包中，点击“Add（添加）”按钮，选择Integration Flow（集成流程）作为新建部件，命名后进入其编辑界面。

在集成流程的编辑页面中，我们将根据需求配置流程步骤。在本示例中，流程较为简洁，仅保留“End（结束）”和“Receiver（接收器）”步骤。

请注意，在编辑页面中单击选中创建的步骤模块，即可以配置其详细参数。

 

图3 - 开始集成流程的编辑

 

四、添加定时触发器（Timer）

为了实现作业的定时自动触发，我们在流程中添加一个开始步骤（Start），选择Timer（计时器）类型。选中以配置该计时器参数：

  • 触发频率：例如，每5分钟触发一次
  • 开始时间（可选）：设定为立即开始或者指定时间
  • 结束时间（可选）：确定作业持续时间或终止点

这一步骤确保流程按预定时间自动启动，无需人工干预。

图4 - 添加、编辑定时器

 

五、配置业务操作（调用API）

完成计时器设置后，进入API调用步骤，我们需要特别注意准备请求体（Body）内容，否则API调用无法成功。在此步骤中，配置目标API端点、请求参数等细节。确保请求设置合理，能成功获取所需数据。

具体操作如下：

1. 添加一个需要消息返回的API调用

图5 - 添加需要消息返回的步骤

2. 准备请求体（Body）

在“调用API”之前，需要在流程中添加一个“Content Modifier（内容修改器）”步骤，用于构建请求体内容。

  • 添加一个Content Modifier步骤，例如在这里我们命名为“准备Body”。
  • 单击选中该步骤模块，可以配置其详细参数。首先在Message Header页签为接口调用创建额外的抬头参数。
  • 接着在 Message Body页签中Body区域，输入API所需的请求报文内容。
  • 你也可以使用表达式或变量动态生成请求参数，比如引用先前步骤的变量，确保请求内容符合API接口的规范。

图6 - 添加、编辑内容修改器

3. 配置API请求步骤

画一根连接线，连接“调用API” 与“Receiver”模块。选中连接线，在下方配置API请求的相关内容。

  • 选择请求方法（如POST）
  • 配置请求URL、请求头（例如Content-Type：application/json）
  • 请求体（Body）：引用之前“PrepareBody”步骤中构建的内容。

这样，API调用时就会携带完整的请求数据。

图7 - 配置API请求步骤

4. 处理API响应

  • API调用成功后，可以将响应数据绑定到变量或直接处理。你可以添加“Content Modifier”或“Receiver”步骤，用于解析返回内容（如JSON中的特定字段）或存储备用。在这里我们配置了Receiver。

5. 完成集成流配置。

对每两个集成步骤模块之间，均通过画连接线将其串接；每一个箭头指向下一个步骤模块。

图8 - 连接步骤模块

 

六、部署与监控

配置完成后，保存并部署流程。系统将按设定的时间间隔自动启动流程，调用API，实现定时数据同步或其他自动化任务。

通过左侧菜单，你可以通过BTP集成监控界面，跟踪作业的执行状态和日志信息，确保流程正常运行。

完成后可以到监控界面看到这个作业是否成功被执行了。

通过在SAP BTP集成套件中配置定时触发的流程，并提前准备好请求体内容，企业可以高效实现自动化数据操作和接口调用。掌握这些技巧，将大大提升你的流程自动化能力，为数字化转型提供有力支持。

如果你有更多需求，欢迎继续关注我们的内容或联系技术支持，共同优化你的集成方案。

entry.title: Re: How to exclude hedged open items from foreign currenc...
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the “Accounting Exchange Rate” field is not used by default to exclude items from foreign currency valuation.

Solution,

  • Use a custom document type or indicator for FX-hedged items.
  • In the valuation method config (SSCUI 102587), set rules to exclude those items based on doc type or reference.
  • If needed, tag documents using Custom Fields and filter them out in reports (not valuation run).

 Not Supported,

  • You can’t exclude items based on the exchange rate field directly.
  • No BAdI is available for valuation logic in the Public Cloud.

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: you can not post write up in t code of - ABZU
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am unable to adjust the unplnned depreciation in t code of ABZU.

 

Coud you please help me to get it resolved.

 

thank you 

 

Regards

 

 

 

Phone - PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: you can not post write up in t code of - ABZU
entry.content:
What you can do is unpanned depreciation. 

Transaction ABAA

and transaction type 640 (or 650, depends on if the asset has prior year acqusition or not)


 Transaction Type     640 Unplanned depreciation on prior-year acquisitions

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Desktop Agent Installation Error : "The integrity of the version can't be checked.
entry.content: Could you try to download the agent from Lobby -> Control Tower -> Agent Update page as shown in the steps in this tutorial ?

entry.title: Re: Principal Propagation in SAP Integration Suite from external system to an SAP Backend
entry.content:
Hello Team,

i have scenario where i'm using sender as postman and want to propagate the user till backend of on premise s4 using cpi through Cloud connector.

at sender while calling the CPI service i tried both basic and oauth2 and both are working fine.

as header X-JWT-Assertion sending user info as base64 bearer token along wiht authorization.

in cpi extracted the user info after decoded using the below code and constructed the header before calling ODATA channel for S4 where location ID of cloud connector and auth as principal propagation is already set.

but my cosutm header is always overwriten by cpi (if i use basic auth at psotman then bringing my S-user info, if i use oauth2 then bringing clientId info for propagation).

how to acheive this ?

Am i going in the right direction or missing anything ?

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.util.UUID
import java.util.Base64
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
import groovy.json.JsonOutput

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def headers = message.getHeaders()
    def jwt = headers.get("X-JWT-Assertion")?.replace("Bearer ", "")
    def payloadEncoded = jwt?.split("\\.")[1]
    def payloadJson = new String(Base64.decoder.decode(payloadEncoded), "UTF-8")
    def payload = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper().parseText(payloadJson)
   
    def upn = payload.upn
    if(!upn) {
      throw new Exception("upn claim not found in JWT")
    }

    def attributes = [:]
    attributes.name = upn
    attributes.type = "cust"
    attributes.name_id = "uid"

    if (payload.email) attributes.email = payload.email
    if (payload.given_name) attributes.firstname = payload.given_name
    if (payload.family_name) attributes.lastname = payload.family_name

    def finalJson = [
      name: upn,
      attributes: attributes
    ]

    def jsonString = JsonOutput.toJson(finalJson)
    def base64String = Base64.encoder.encodeToString(jsonString.getBytes("UTF-8"))
    def headerValue = "PrincipalPropagation "+ base64String

    message.setHeader("SAP-Connectivity-Authentication", headerValue)
    message.setProperty("username", upn)
    return message
}
Error Tect when used token - 
Unable to generate authorization token for user oauth_client_TestConnection

entry.title: Re: Proxy vs BAPI ? which is the best way
entry.content: I’ve used BAPIs for quick integrations with standard functionality, especially when stability matters. But for custom logic or complex structures, proxies gave me more control and flexibility.

entry.title: Re: CDS Hierarchy Directory: How to use NOTASSIGNEDNODE Annotation to suppress or to filter the Not
entry.content:
Hi Lina,

we have written to each other in this Post. CDS : How to define Hierarchy View - SAP Community

I now followed the suggestion von SAP and generated a artifacial CDS Hierarchy which works in general. 

But I have a problem that the REST_H node does not display the node/leafs which does not have Hierarchy , where as the sum of value is correct but just the elements not. so it's quite strange. 

the other question is when I add the following two lines to my Hierarchy Directory CDS 

@Hierarchy.notAssignedNode.suppressIndicator: true

'X' as suppressNotAssigned

I get a internal error

Short Text Access using a 'ZERO' object reference is not possible.
Runtime Error OBJECTS_OBJREF_NOT_ASSIGNED_NO
Exception CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL
Program CL_FPM_RUIBB_BICS_GRID========CP
Application Component BW-RUI-FPM

it would be great if you can help me with them. 

Many thanks in advance 

Tao

entry.title: Records Merge to one xml based on condition after splitter
entry.content:
csv data:
Person_ID,Person_FirstName,Person_LastName,Company_Code,Company_Name,Country
1001,Rahul,A,101,Santoor,India
1002,Ramesh,S,101,Santoor,India
1003,Ravali,P,103,Medmix,US
1004,Raju,Y,104,Dove,AUS
1005,Ritesh,L,104,Dove,AUS
1006,Varun,P,104,Dove,Spain
1007,James,Y,105,Vivel,France

I'm getting separate records for 1 country in the end message because of using general splitter.
But i want all records of same country in the same end message.

How can i get same country xml records in one message

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google...

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention at SAP Sapphire 2025: Event Recap
entry.content:
SAP Sapphire 2025 once again showcased SAP’s commitment to innovation, digital transformation, and continuous collaboration with our valued customers and partners. These flagship events that were held in Orlando, May 19-21, 2025, and Madrid, May 26-28, 2025, served as a global platform for business leaders, industry experts, and technology pioneers to explore emerging trends, share best practices, and forge meaningful connections. Key initiatives from SAP Sapphire 2025 aimed at enhancing customer experience and driving business transformation:

  • Introduction of a tiered service plan offering customers tailored solutions that align with their specific needs and strategic goals. This approach ensures that businesses receive personalized support and can maximize their potential with SAP solutions.
  • AI assistance from SAP MaxAttention generating valuable insights and providing recommendations for business and data-capacity enhancements.
  • Harnessing the flywheel effect by leveraging synergy between applications, data, and AI to create a continuous improvement loop, making businesses increasingly smarter and more efficient.
  • Data and AI are pivotal in business transformation with SAP Joule positioned at the forefront, serving as a key orchestrator.

Throughout the event, SAP MaxAttention played a central role in creating a personalized and engaging experience. Our goal was to ensure that every participant could maximize their time, deepen relationships, and gain valuable insights that translate into real-world business success. Here’s a summary of the core activities of SAP MaxAttention that made each stop memorable:

SAP MaxAttention Lounges: Personal Connections and Executive Access
The exclusive networking lounges provided a relaxed, thoughtfully designed space for in-depth conversations, away from the main conference hustle. Attendees appreciated the intimate setting, which facilitated direct exchanges with SAP executives and fellow customers. These spaces fostered candid conversations, enabling participants to ask strategic questions, share challenges, and explore tailored approaches.
Beyond that the executive exchange sessions promoted peer-to-peer dialogue, building authentic relationships that extend beyond the event and into long-term collaborations. In addition to eight executive exchanges, we had more than 280 customer touchpoints in both lounges, marking an increase compared to previous years. We hope to build on this success and facilitate further personal conversations next year.

Sessions: Business Transformation in Action
Our diverse lineup of sessions featured SAP executives, such as Anja Schneider, Sebastien Denes, and Balaji Rao Gaddam, as well as industry experts from Roche, Sabre, HP Inc., Accenture, E.ON, AstraZeneca, and Heineken, among others, sharing the latest trends, strategies, and case studies. The sessions yet again reiterated how SAP MaxAttention supports customers in moving from safe-guarding to game-changing acceleration.
For those who want to revisit the content, recordings and presentation slides are available here:

  • Watch on-demand replays
  • Session Material folder for SAP employees
  • Session slides:
    • From Safeguarding to Game-Changing: The Next Era of Enterprise Management – Strategy Talk by Anja Schneider (Senior Vice President, Global Head of Premium Engagement & Advisory, Customer Services & Delivery)
    • The new era of transforming business with premium engagements and AI – Strategy Talk by Sebastien Denes (Global Vice President - Head of Premium Engagement Experience, SAP SE) with Rajib Podder (SABRE GLBL INC)
    • Driving extensive business suite adoption with Premium Engagement offerings – Customer Success Story by Balaji Gaddam (VP - Head of Premium Hub COE, SAP AMERICA, INC.) with Abdel Altabarani (Accenture)
    • Digital transformation with SAP Business AI and SAP MaxAttention – Ask the Expert by Reshat Furunzhiev (Premium Hub CoE EMEA, Customer Services & Delivery, SAP)
    • Business transformation as a service with SAP MaxAttention – Customer Success Story by Sebastien Denes (Global Vice President - Head of Premium Engagement Experience, SAP SE) with Russell Smith (AstraZeneca UK Ltd)

Booth: Spontaneous Meetups and Networking
The SAP MaxAttention booth served as a hub for informal interactions, allowing attendees to connect with premium engagements experts and fellow customers. This space inspired quick meetings, brainstorms, and the exchange of ideas—often leading to new insights on the spot.

We sincerely thank everyone who joined us in Orlando, Madrid, and our other stops along the tour. Your active engagement and curiosity made each city’s experience unique and impactful. If you are already curious about SAP Sapphire next year, you can sign up to receive updates when registration for 2026 opens:

  • Event updates SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando, May 2026
  • Event updates SAP Sapphire Madrid, May 2026

We look forward to welcoming you to our future events and continuing the journey of innovation together.

entry.title: Re: Sales order not approving for TAS item cat.
entry.content: How the sale order approval process is configured ?   You can ask the user to enter another line item for the same material and save it so that for that line item PR would be generated.  Meanwhile,  you need to ask the user to set Deletion indicator for the PO already generated without referencing the PR

- Cian

entry.title: Re: Recap Series: SAP Community members speaking at SAP Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
Nice to meet you.

I work at a water utility in Northern Virginia (just outside the Washington DC Beltway), providing SAP support in many areas, including security, finance, Solution Manager, etc.

Our water utility provides water to 1 in 4 people in the great state of Virginia.

I participate in the SAP ecosystem by being an ASUG volunteer and on the advisory panel for SAP for Utilities coming soon in September.

Later this month, I will be participating in a firehouse caucus

entry.title: Re: How do I apply the "Enabled Single-Sender" Email Addr...
entry.content:
Hi @geenaouellette 

This is currently not possible, but there is an open enhancement request about this particular topic. 

Feedback request notification with Single Sender. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/307004

You can encourage your customer(s) to vote for this enhancement if this is something that would benefit them. 

Best regards, 

Jordi

entry.title: Re: Supply area is WM managed but not extended for EWM Production Supply Area
entry.content:
Hi mayurs819,

thank you for the comment.

The destination supply area is in a storage location that is EWM managed. At least this is the goal. I assume there is a path in the customizing that I am not aware of that prevents this assignment from being correct. The issue is probable in the customizing related to the integration between the Core and EWM. 
The error message is NJIT_O_MSG023 in case this information helps you.

entry.title: Re: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？
entry.content: 感谢您的帮助，如实际成本核算过程中，将物料及活动类型的差异分别列示，如物料的BOM中用量10EA，标准价格为100元，实际价格为90元，实际投入的11EA，数量差异与价格差异分别列示？

entry.title: Re: PL30 entries missing after copying Cons Group in SAP...
entry.content:
Hello Olga,

Setting used: 
Org Unit: Cons Group: A01, 
Settings: Copy From: Version "X" To Version "X", From Fiscal 2024, To Fiscal 2024, From Period: 12, To Period: 12
Further Settings: Consolidation group: A02

Error message: 

Cannot copy - "from" and "to" items are identical

Message no. G0153

 regards,

Indraneel

And then select some invoices:

Is this possible using a bapi?

thanks!

entry.title: Re: PL30 entries missing after copying Cons Group in SAP...
entry.content: Hello Olga - we tried the CXCK option also, but the Copy Transaction Data works only with different source / destination version.

entry.title: Announcing SAP Inside Track Hyderabad: Join Us on July 26, 2025!
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is back and better than ever! Mark your calendars for July 26, 2025, as we bring together SAP enthusiasts, experts, and professionals for a day of insightful sessions, networking, and innovation. Registration is now open, and we invite you to secure your spot for this exciting event.

What is SAP Inside Track?   
SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event where SAP professionals, developers, consultants, architects, and leaders come together to share their knowledge and insights on various SAP-related topics. This grassroots initiative, organized by members of the SAP Community, provides a platform for fostering connections, staying updated on the latest SAP technologies, and gaining recognition for your technical expertise. 
Know more about SAP Inside Track Here!

Event Highlights

  1. Expert-Led Sessions
    • Keynote Speeches: Hear from industry leaders and SAP experts about the latest advancements in SAP technologies.
    • Technical Deep Dives: Participate in sessions that cover a wide range of topics, from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Cloud Platform, and everything in between.
    • Hands-On Workshops: Engage in interactive workshops designed to provide practical experience with SAP tools and solutions.
  2. Networking Opportunities
    • Meet the Experts: Connect with SAP professionals, developers, and consultants from various industries.
    • Community Building: Build relationships with peers who share your passion for SAP and technology.

Why Attend?

  • Expand Your Knowledge: Gain insights into the latest SAP technologies and trends.
  • Enhance Your Skills: Participate in hands-on workshops and technical sessions.
  • Grow Your Network: Connect with like-minded professionals and industry experts.
  • Get Inspired: Discover new ideas and innovative solutions that can transform your business.

Registration Details

Registration for SAP Inside Track Hyderabad in Open! Don’t miss this opportunity to be part of a vibrant community and stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of SAP. 

Visit the Registration Page: SAP Inside Track 2025

Note: This is an in-person event only.

Event Details

  • Date: July 26, 2025
  • Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
  • Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)
  • Contact: For any queries, please contact us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com

Speaker Registration: 

Speaker registrations are now open! If you're an expert in building AI applications on SAP BTP, developing innovative Business AI solutions, or working with embedded AI in SAP solutions like SAP S/4HANA or SuccessFactors, we welcome your contribution. We also invite partners and customers to showcase their work.   Link to Submit Speaker Nomination 

Exclusive Sponsorship Opportunities: 

With over 7500 community members across locations in the past 12 months, we’re eager to continue growing. If you're interested in sponsoring the event, please comment below, and we’ll reach out to you. This year, we have exclusive sponsor bundles that offer opportunities to showcase your content and expertise across multiple locations, including Bangalore, Gurgaon, Hyderabad, and Pune. 

Join the Conversation

Stay connected and join the conversation on social media using the hashtag #sitHYD. Follow us on Twitter and LinkedIn, for the latest updates and announcements.

We look forward to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2025! Let’s come together to learn, share, and innovate.

 

Thanks & Regards

SAP Community HYD

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2025, July 26 2025
entry.content:
Event Overview

Date: July 26, 2025
Location: Hyderabad, India
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is a community-driven event that brings together SAP users, developers, and experts from various industries. The event aims to foster learning, networking, and collaboration through a series of insightful sessions, workshops, and discussions.

Call for Speakers

We are looking for dynamic speakers to present on a variety of topics related to SAP technologies and solutions, we want to hear from you!

Topics of Interest

  1. Business AI Showcases & Use Cases
  2. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
  3. Embedded AI across Solutions - SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products
  4. SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors & Other SAP Products

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Hyderabad?

  • Share Your Expertise: Showcase your knowledge and insights to a diverse and engaged audience.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with other SAP professionals, thought leaders, and industry experts.
  • Enhance Your Profile: Gain recognition and visibility within the SAP community.
  • Contribute to the Community: Play a part in the growth and development of the SAP ecosystem.

 How to register

To submit your proposal, please visit this link and complete the online submission form. If you have any questions or need further information, please contact us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com.

Next Steps: Once you submit your proposal,
Step 1: Our expert team will go through your proposal and if it is shortlisted, we will contact your for more details.
Step 2: This will again be discussed internally with the experts and once shortlisted, we will inform you about the next steps – like presentation format, social media advertisement etc.,

 

Thanks & Regards

SAP Community Hyd

entry.title: Re: Tool Logging automatically and manually in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hi @sunita_sarkar it works fine for WORK CENTER POD but i need to use the plugin on an ORDER POD cause my customer, discrete production, doesn't track SFC and want qty confirmation.

entry.title: Re: Position Workflow Comment is Auto Filled
entry.content: Thanks Arun, please elaborate on how comment can be auto filled via business rule, any KBA or blog in support of this?

entry.title: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Views with ABAP Cloud Programming on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently learning SAP BTP and working with SAP ABAP Cloud Programming for the first time in Eclipse. While creating a CDS View, I noticed that I couldn’t use standard SAP tables like BKPF or BSEG directly in the CDS View.

During my research on how to use standard SAP tables in ABAP Cloud Programming, I found that these tables need to be released first before they can be used in the cloud environment.

Could someone please explain how to release these tables for use in the cloud? Or is there another recommended way to access standard table data in SAP BTP / ABAP Cloud?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Standalone Retrofit SAP Solution Manager 7.2 - Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Rishi,

We are trying to retrofit 2 different domains using different transport paths, do we need to go with standalone or cross-release retrofit?

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: How to hide post button of "Create Supplier Invoice"
entry.content:
Hi Bob,

I am looking for a similar setting option in the area of posting supplier invoices (created out of SAP Central Invoice Management). In this process, too, there is a requirement that the “Post” button should explicitly not be used and instead the “Parked as completed” button should be used to trigger the supplier invoice workflow before posting.

Best regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: How to add Odata Service to a Fiori App?
entry.content:
It's unclear if you service is a OData V2 or an OData V4

/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE -> only used in V2

/IWBEP/V4_ADMIN + /IWFND/V4_ADMIN -> only used in V4

Regardless how you created the service - it must be registered/published in one of those 2 depending the OData version.

Please clarify:

  • OData version
  • If it's already registered in the right transaction
  • If your system does support HTTPS with certificate or not
  • If you are able to call the service using /IWFND/GW_CLIENT in HTTP and/or HTTPS

I suggest to not use the "Connect to an OData Service" in VS Code/BAS. Use option "Connect to a system" instead. (once again this bad naming confusing people). Like that you will input system and port information and the wizard will show you the services already registered (if this is not working it means you don't have basic services/setup done in this environment yet).

This option will change the way ui5.yaml are configured.  If the issue persisit please share the ui5.yaml file and the /IWFND/ERROR_LOG details here.

entry.title: Re: How to create post request with json body via Sap Cpi ?
entry.content: can u please provide the solution?

entry.title: Re: Unit Price not showing for an item during Inventory T...
entry.content: Thank you LoHa

Hi @MelanieBelzile ,

can you throw some more light on the second option,  Fixed value field is something can we use whatever we want?? anyway that should be mapped with some field in LMS to LMS to hold under user attribute??

In parallel i am looking for other options like is there any other fields go empty in onboarding? but onboarding status is actually "Active_external_suite" why this status is not being moved to LMS as same. 

Regards

Bharath G

Bharath G

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:

I am available for mentorship.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
hi @Brenomatias 

Based on the screenshot, I am assuming you are working on BAS. It looks like there may be an auth issue with the destination [s4h]. In order for this flow to succeed, the destination must be able to connect to a chosen service and retrieve metadata. 

Can you please check the service via the service center, see documentation here. You should be able to click 'SAP System' and then your [s4h] destination, and the desired service should present with a green symbol when clicked, and the Create Project button should be enabled on the service details page.

If this is not the case, and you are encountering auth issues at this point, please refer to some of our guided answers #1 and #2  . If these do not help, please provide more information of your current set up.

Best regards,

Cian

Fiori tools team

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps/Process Automation: "Workflow Definiti...
entry.content:
Hi Cherry,
We're experiencing the same issue in our project. Do you have any updates?

entry.title: Re: S4HANA cloud - Controlling - Maintain Plan Version (On premise) missing in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello OwenLiu,

As of today, in S/4 Public Cloud, there is still no CO plan version?

Is it in the roadmap to have planning version?

Best regards

Francisco Costa

entry.title: Re: REST API Integration and Data Visualization in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Thank you, Spandhana, for sharing this insightful blog. The information provided is highly valuable and much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Vi...
entry.content:
Dear Shivam 

Only SAP can release standard tables or objects. As a developer, you can only use what has already been released.

 

Have you considered using released CDS views or APIs instead of accessing tables directly?

Steps to find released alternatives:

a) Search for released CDS views in ADT (Eclipse)
Use Ctrl+Shift+A (Open ABAP Object) and search for:

I_BKPF*
I_BSEG*
I_AccountingDocument*
I_JournalEntry*

b) Check the Released Objects in your ABAP Cloud project
In Eclipse:

  • Right-click your project → ABAP Cloud Environment → Released Objects
  • Filter by object type (e.g., CDS View)

c) Browse SAP API Business Hub
Go to: https://api.sap.com
Search for APIs like:

  • Journal Entry – Read
  • Read Accounting Document
  • I_GLAccountLineItem

Examples of useful released CDS views:

  • I_JournalEntry
  • I_GLAccountLineItem
  • I_AccountingDocument
  • I_Customer
  • I_Supplieŕ’

Tip

If you can't find a direct replacement for a table like BKPF or BSEG:

  • Check if you can join multiple released views
  • Use custom RAP projection views
  • Consider consuming data via ODATA APIs or SAP Graph
  • Follow clean-core architecture principles

Best regards

entry.title: Issue with deleted Purchase Requisition still generating MRP demand (Fiori App F4795)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing a situation related to purchase requisitions created by MRP and deleted via the Fiori App F4795 — Hand Over Purchase Requisitions (F4795).

Scenario:

A purchase requisition generated by MRP for the parent item was deleted via the Fiori App F4795 Hand Over Purchase Requisitions (Table EBAN, field LOEKZ = X).

However, the MRP still shows a Subassembly Requirement (BB) for the child item, with the same quantity and date as the deleted requisition.

The parent component (semi-finished product) still has a reservation that was not cleared (Table RESB, field KZEAR ≠ X).

  • Has anyone faced similar behavior, where a deleted requisition still generates MRP demand due to an open Subassembly Requirement or an uncleared reservation?
  • Is there any official solution or correction note for this?
  • What is the best practice to ensure that deleted requisitions do not continue generating demand in MRP when using F4795?

I have read the article by @Caetano about this app and would appreciate any help with this difficulty.

Thank you very much in advance for your support!

entry.title: Not able to find the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_GLO_GCO_PC
entry.content:
Unable to find the SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_GLO_GCO_PC business catalog for Activate Document and Reporting Compliance Features.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Not able to find the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LN...
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

Kindly make sure you have activated 5XU scope item in S/4Hana Cloud system. Once activated the 5XU scope item, assign the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_GLO_GCO_PC to your business user for 'Activate Document and Reporting Compliance Features'.

 

Please refer the 3237813 - DRC - Run Statutory Reports (F1515) - Analytics icon is not visible to user KBA for more information.

 

Best regards,

Atanu

SAP Support - S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Analytical Model Performance Trace & PlanViz
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to analyze the Performance of an Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere to identify possible design issues. Therefore I follow the SAP Help documentation to extract the MDS Statement and generate the PlanViz File.

But I currently have the following problem:

  1. I execute the Model in SAC and retreive the MDS statement. Here I have a runtime of about ~40 seconds.
  2. Then I call generate the MDS statement with the CALL SYS.EXECUTE_MDS(...) statement. Here I have the behaviour that this is then generated in around ~1 second and the PlanViz is not reflecting the ~40 seconds runtime in the frontend.

My current assumption is that this is due to the MDS cache. But in the Database Console also cannot flush it, due to missing authorization. 

Does anybody has had similar issues or knows any best practices to generate a correct PlanViz out of an Analytical Model MDS statement?

Thank you for your input!

Regards

Christian

entry.content:
Hello Dr. Rett,

Thank you very much for this blog post. It was very helpful in setting up situation handling. I do have one question, it seems the only way our business user sees the notification with the notification bell is when they are assigned a situation. Is there a way to set things up so the user will see all notifications for a situation? Not just ones which are assigned to them.

Thanks,

Jz

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content:
Hello @Edina , 

Thanks for the detailed explanation above. This is really helpful. 

I have a question regarding a Custom Check Rule. 
Let's say we utilise BADI UKM_CHECK_STEP to write the logic for customer specific needs, but then, we want the parameters within that logic to be made configurable in the Check Rule. 
How can we achieve that? Could you please help with that?

For example: in the standard check step: 020 Check for Maximum Document Value, we can assign the Maximum Doc Value per Credit Segment, when we configure the check rule. 


Similarly, if we want certain fields that are not delivered by SAP standard, how can we bring those fields and make them a configurable field?
Thanking you in anticipation.

entry.title: Re: Print GS1-128 Bar code using adobe forms
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: I want to mass delete some old Purchase requistions but MASS not working
entry.content: I have tried using MASS to delete very old purchase requistions in SAP the MASS update says successful but it doesnt work. If i go back into MASS for the relevant PR i used for testing its unticked and also in table EBAN its not ticked. I have tried using ME57 but the closed option is greyed out. How do I get rid of all these old PR's there are hundreds of them. I can find nothing on this or any other community. Thanks Dean

entry.title: Re: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？
entry.content:
Hi @lemon-xue ,

您好，您试过“物料价格分析”（Material Price Analysis CKM3）app里面的“评估数量结构（Valuated Quantity Structure）”按钮吗？位于屏幕上方菜单第3个左右图标。它会在屏幕左侧以树状结构显示所输入产成品的各生产级别原料及活动类型的实际耗用数量，初次评估价值、实际价值及两者差异。

When choosing Valuated Quantity Structure icon, you see the a tree view showing production structure for your specified material and all of its production levels, including finished goods, semi-finished goods, raw materials, and activity types. For each of them, actual consumed quantities, preliminary valuation, actual values, and differences are displayed.

Let me know if it answers your question!

Thanks!

Grace
